title: Integrate monorepo benchmarks into check_benchmarks
description: Wire new benchmarks into tooling with baseline thresholds and reporting. Ensure reproducible runs and clean temp data.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: check_benchmarks integration complete in tools/check_benchmarks.py with thresholds updated in tools/perf_baseline.json; discovery benchmarks included and temp fixtures cleaned after runs.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: check_benchmarks includes monorepo benchmarks with thresholds; temp directories cleaned after runs.
